title: sample_apologetics_dialogue

claims.text: Because we have thousands of manuscript witnesses, and the textual variants are mostly minor.
The earliest testimony in 1 Corinthians 15:3-8 is too early to be dismissed as late legend.

evidence_refs: Because we have thousands of manuscript witnesses, and the textual variants are mostly minor.
That answer points to eyewitness claims, hostile-witness conversion, and the empty tomb tradition.

qa_cards.question: Why should anyone trust the New Testament manuscripts?
qa_cards.answer: Because we have thousands of manuscript witnesses, and the textual variants are mostly minor. Scholars also compare early quotations from church fathers to test stability.

qa_cards.question: But isn't the resurrection just legend?
qa_cards.answer: The earliest testimony in 1 Corinthians 15:3-8 is too early to be dismissed as late legend. That answer points to eyewitness claims, hostile-witness conversion, and the empty tomb tradition.

qa_cards.question: how do we answer the objection that science has disproved God
qa_cards.answer: We should say science describes regularities in creation, but it does not rule out a creator.
